tripOverview.intro: San Juan combines colonial charm with pristine beaches, creating the perfect romantic Caribbean escape. This vibrant capital offers historic cobblestone streets, world-class cuisine, and stunning coastlines ideal for couples seeking both culture and relaxation.
tripOverview.vibe: A perfect blend of historic romance and tropical paradise with plenty of beach time and cultural discoveries.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April is ideal with perfect weather, fewer crowds, and blooming flora.

attractions.name: Old San Juan
attractions.desc: Historic colonial district with colorful buildings and cobblestone streets.

attractions.name: El Yunque National Forest
attractions.desc: Tropical rainforest with waterfalls and hiking trails.

attractions.name: Condado Beach
attractions.desc: Popular beach with calm waters and beachfront dining.

destinationOverview.transportation: Public buses (AMA) connect major areas for $0.75 per ride. Taxis are readily available but negotiate fares beforehand or use Uber which operates throughout San Juan. Walking is ideal for Old San Juan's compact historic district.
destinationOverview.tip: Rent a car for El Yunque and beach hopping, but avoid driving in Old San Juan due to narrow streets and limited parking.
destinationOverview.safety: San Juan is generally safe for tourists, but stay aware of surroundings and avoid isolated areas at night.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans covering Puerto Rico and the Caribbean region.

days.intro: Begin your romantic Puerto Rican adventure exploring the colorful colonial streets of Old San Juan.

morning.name: Arrive in San Juan
morning.desc: Land and take Uber to hotel in Condado.

morning.name: Check-in & Refresh
morning.desc: Settle into your hotel and prepare for exploration.

afternoon.name: Old San Juan Walking
afternoon.desc: Stroll the cobblestone streets and admire colonial architecture.

afternoon.name: El Morro Fortress
afternoon.desc: Explore the historic fortress with stunning ocean views.

evening.name: Sunset at Paseo de la Princesa
evening.desc: Romantic waterfront promenade perfect for sunset photos.

evening.name: Dinner at Café Puerto Rico
evening.desc: Traditional Puerto Rican cuisine in the heart of Old San Juan.

days.tip: Wear comfortable walking shoes for Old San Juan's uneven cobblestones and bring a light jacket for evening ocean breezes.

days.intro: Relax and unwind with a full day of sun, sand, and romantic beachfront dining.

morning.name: Breakfast at Kasalta
morning.desc: Famous local bakery and café known for fresh pastries.

morning.name: Condado Beach
morning.desc: Set up at the beautiful beach right outside your hotel.

afternoon.name: Beach Lunch at Serafina
afternoon.desc: Oceanfront dining with Mediterranean cuisine and cocktails.

afternoon.name: Beach Relaxation
afternoon.desc: Continue enjoying the sun and crystal-clear waters.

afternoon.name: Laguna del Condado Paddleboard
afternoon.desc: Romantic paddleboarding in the calm lagoon waters.

evening.name: Cocktails at La Concha Resort
evening.desc: Beachfront bar with stunning sunset views and craft cocktails.

evening.name: Dinner at 1919 Restaurant
evening.desc: Upscale oceanfront dining with innovative Puerto Rican cuisine.

days.tip: Apply sunscreen frequently and stay hydrated - the Caribbean sun is stronger than you think, even in April.

days.intro: Explore Puerto Rico's lush tropical rainforest with waterfalls, hiking trails, and exotic wildlife.

morning.name: Early Breakfast
morning.desc: Grab quick breakfast before your rainforest adventure.

morning.name: Drive to El Yunque
morning.desc: Rent a car or join guided tour to the national forest.

afternoon.name: La Mina Falls Hike
afternoon.desc: Easy hike to beautiful waterfall perfect for swimming.

afternoon.name: Lunch at El Verde BBQ
afternoon.desc: Local lechón and vegetarian options near the forest.

afternoon.name: Yokahú Tower
afternoon.desc: Climb observation tower for panoramic rainforest views.

evening.name: Return to San Juan
evening.desc: Drive back to the city as the sun sets.

evening.name: Relaxed Dinner at Verde Mesa
evening.desc: Farm-to-table restaurant with excellent vegetarian options.

days.tip: Bring water shoes for waterfall swimming, insect repellent, and a waterproof bag for your phone and valuables.

days.intro: Experience one of Puerto Rico's most beautiful beaches with white sand and turquoise waters.

morning.name: Coffee at Café con Blondie
morning.desc: Cozy local coffee shop with excellent breakfast options.

morning.name: Isla Verde Beach
morning.desc: Spend the morning on pristine white sand beach.

afternoon.name: Lunch at Metropol
afternoon.desc: Beachfront Cuban restaurant with great vegetarian dishes.

afternoon.name: Water Sports
afternoon.desc: Try jet skiing or parasailing for an adrenaline rush.

afternoon.name: Beach Massage
afternoon.desc: Couples massage on the beach for ultimate relaxation.

evening.name: Sunset at Pine Grove Beach
evening.desc: Quiet stretch of beach perfect for romantic sunset viewing.

evening.name: Dinner at Budatai
evening.desc: Asian fusion cuisine in a trendy Condado setting.

days.tip: Isla Verde can get crowded on weekends, so stake out your spot early for the best beach real estate.

days.intro: Immerse yourselves in San Juan's vibrant arts scene and cultural attractions.

morning.name: Breakfast at Panadería España
morning.desc: Traditional Spanish bakery with excellent pastries and coffee.

morning.name: Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico
morning.desc: Impressive collection of Puerto Rican and Caribbean art.

afternoon.name: Santurce Street Art Tour
afternoon.desc: Self-guided walk through colorful street murals.

afternoon.name: Lunch at Lote 23
afternoon.desc: Food truck park with diverse vegetarian-friendly options.

afternoon.name: Casa Blanca Museum
afternoon.desc: Historic house museum with beautiful gardens.

evening.name: Pre-dinner drinks at Jungle Bird
evening.desc: Tropical cocktail bar with Instagram-worthy drinks.

evening.name: Dinner at Marmalade
evening.desc: Award-winning fine dining with creative tasting menu.

days.tip: Many museums offer free admission on certain days - check websites before visiting to save money.

days.intro: Take a ferry to the pristine island of Culebra for some of the world's most beautiful beaches.

morning.name: Early departure to Fajardo
morning.desc: Drive or take taxi to Fajardo ferry terminal.

morning.name: Ferry to Culebra
morning.desc: Scenic 90-minute ferry ride to paradise island.

afternoon.name: Flamenco Beach
afternoon.desc: Consistently ranked among world's best beaches.

afternoon.name: Beach Lunch at Zaco's Tacos
afternoon.desc: Simple beachside eats with vegetarian options.

afternoon.name: Snorkeling at Carlos Rosario Beach
afternoon.desc: Incredible underwater coral reef perfect for couples.

evening.name: Ferry back to Fajardo
evening.desc: Return journey with stunning sunset views.

evening.name: Late dinner at José Enrique
evening.desc: Renowned no-reservations restaurant worth the wait.

days.tip: Bring cash for Culebra as ATMs are limited, and pack snacks and plenty of water for the day trip.

days.intro: Your final full day focuses on romantic experiences and creating lasting memories together.

morning.name: Leisurely brunch at Acai Bowls PR
Couples Spa at Zen Spa
morning.desc: Relaxing couples treatment to unwind together.

afternoon.name: Shopping at Distrito T-Mobile
afternoon.desc: Modern shopping center for souvenirs and local crafts.

afternoon.name: Afternoon at Ocean Park Beach
afternoon.desc: Quieter beach perfect for intimate conversations.

evening.name: Sunset Cocktails at Rooftop at Olive
evening.desc: Panoramic city and ocean views with craft cocktails.

evening.name: Farewell Dinner at Pikayo
evening.desc: Celebrity chef restaurant for a memorable final night.

evening.name: Nightcap at La Placita
evening.desc: Lively plaza with bars and late-night energy.

days.tip: Book spa treatments and dinner reservations in advance, especially for your final romantic evening together.

days.intro: Enjoy final moments in paradise before heading home with unforgettable memories.

morning.name: Final Beach Walk
morning.desc: Take one last romantic stroll along Condado Beach.

morning.name: Checkout & Coffee
morning.desc: Hotel checkout and grab coffee for the journey home.

afternoon.name: Airport Departure
afternoon.desc: Head to Luis Muñoz Marín Airport for your flight.

afternoon.name: Flight to Philadelphia
afternoon.desc: Safe travels back home with memories to last forever.

days.tip: Allow extra time at the airport for security and arrive at least 2 hours early for your mainland US flight.

food.intro: San Juan's food scene brilliantly combines traditional Puerto Rican flavors with international influences and vegetarian-friendly options.
food.tip: Many restaurants don't take reservations, so arrive early or be prepared to wait at popular spots like José Enrique.

neighborhoods.name: Condado
neighborhoods.desc: Beachfront area with resorts, restaurants, and nightlife
neighborhoods.whyStay: Easy beach access and romantic dining options

neighborhoods.name: Old San Juan
neighborhoods.desc: Historic colonial district with cobblestone streets
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walking distance to major attractions and historic charm

neighborhoods.name: Isla Verde
neighborhoods.desc: Modern beach area near the airport
neighborhoods.whyStay: Beautiful beaches and easy airport access

luxury.name: El Convento Hotel
luxury.vibe: Historic luxury in Old San Juan

hotels.tip: Book early for better rates and consider Condado for the perfect balance of beach access and city conveniences.

getYourGuide.name: El Yunque Waterfalls & Rainforest Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Full-day guided exploration of Puerto Rico's only tropical rainforest with waterfall swimming.

getYourGuide.name: Culebra Island Snorkeling Adventure
getYourGuide.desc: Day trip to pristine Culebra with world-class snorkeling and beach time.

getYourGuide.name: Bioluminescent Lagoon Kayak Night Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Magical evening paddle through glowing waters in Laguna Grande.

hiddenGems.name: Mosquito Bay Vieques
hiddenGems.desc: The brightest bioluminescent bay in the world, accessible by ferry from Fajardo.

hiddenGems.name: Camuy Caves
hiddenGems.desc: Underground cave system with impressive limestone formations and guided tours.

hiddenGems.name: Paseo de la Princesa
hiddenGems.desc: Romantic waterfront promenade perfect for sunset walks and street performers.

packing.title: April in San Juan, Puerto Rico
packing.intro: Pack for warm tropical weather with occasional light rain showers and strong Caribbean sun.
packing.luggage: A medium suitcase plus carry-on should suffice for this week-long tropical getaway.
packing.tip: Pack reef-safe sunscreen to protect Puerto Rico's coral reefs and bring a reusable water bottle to stay hydrated.
